text: Use /browser-adaptor to find my "team-ai-3" repo in GitHub. And find out the Git clone URL

Can you create a new skill named  "cleanup-prepare"? On calling, you should summarize what you tasks have done, the methodology of doing the tasks and the important points which are worth mentioning. Update existing skills and/or create new skills. Also add the summary into MEMORY.md file. Rewrite and compact MEMORY.md file if needed. Please write the SKILL.md for this "cleanup-prepare" skill.
